title: myriandra glauca
intro: Myriandra glauca, also known as the Yellow Bird Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Myriandra glauca include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture form, allowing users to reap its medicinal benefits.
